name: Lookyloo_Screenshot
author: THA-CERT - PVA
description: Take a screenshot of an url, domain, FQDN or IP and report all HTTP redirections

configurationItems.name: Lookyloo_instance
configurationItems.description: Should be a URL. By default: https://lookyloo.circl.lu/

configurationItems.name: Capture_timeout
configurationItems.description: In seconds. Max analysis time, after, the query will stop. Default: 120s

configurationItems.name: Capture_listing
configurationItems.description: If enabled, captures will appear on Lookyloo's public index page. Default: disabled

configurationItems.name: api_key
configurationItems.description: Lookyloo API key. Required for setting categories on captures.

configurationItems.name: categories
configurationItems.description: Categories to tag captures with. Requires an API key.
